phrases.phrase: Settings for the Redeyed Sentinel self-hosted CAPTCHA + IP-reputation provider. Free to install; the CAPTCHA stays inert until both a Site Key and an API Key are entered below. Get keys at https://redeyed.com (Lab -> Developer -> Sentinel Sites and Developer -> API Keys).
Your public Sentinel site key. Safe to expose in the page; it is rendered into the captcha widget. Find it in Redeyed Lab -> Developer -> Sentinel Sites.
Your secret Sentinel API key. Used server-side only (sent as the X-Api-Key header during verification) and never exposed to the browser. Find it in Redeyed Developer -> API Keys. Keep this private.
Base URL of the Sentinel service. Defaults to https://redeyed.com. Only change this if you run a self-hosted Sentinel instance. No trailing slash needed.
